In a bowl, combine the spices then set aside. In another bowl, combine the liquid ingredients then set aside.

Dans une poÍle, faire chauffer 1 cuillŤre†ŗ soupe de beurre puis†attendrir l‚Äôoignon pendant environ†10 minutes. Saler,†ajouter l‚Äôail et le mťlange d‚Äôťpices†puis poursuivre la cuisson pendant 2 ŗ†3 minutes.

In a frying pan, melt the butter and add the onion mixture and the liquid ingredients. Mix well then bring to a boil. Lower the heat, add the chicken and simmer for 1Ĺ to 2 hours. Adjust the seasoning if necessary.
